I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
The WAVE_GLO_PHY_SPC_L3_NRT_009 CFOSAT 2D spectral product is an innovative product, providing 
a characterization of sea states. Its assessment is presented and assessed by comparison with WAM 
model and Sentinel-1 data.   
This document describes the estimation process and the quality of the operational (NRT) spectral 
products listed hereafter: 
Product WAVE_GLO_PHY_SPC_L3_SPC_NRT_009 
Area Global ocean 
Missions CFOSAT 
Main information - 2D spectral data 
- Partition mask 
- Parameters integrated from the 2D spectral data  
- Parameters integrated from the 2D spectrum after partitioning of the 
sea states 
Spatial resolution 70 km along track with left and right positioning, 45 km apart from the nadir 
ground track 
Temporal resolution 3-hour 
Table 1: Presentation of product’s main information

catalog_entry.summary: This document is an evaluation report for the WAVE_GLO_PHY_SPC_L3_NRT_009 product, detailing its production process and quality assessment based on comparisons with WAM model and Sentinel-1 data.
